description: CompositionBlack jacket made of 100% polyester, has a mock neck with a front zipper closure, full sleeves with elasticated cuffs, adidas patented 3-Stripes from the shoulders to the cuffs, piping along the side seams, zippered pockets at the waist, and has a heat transferred brand logo on the left chest FittingComfortWash careWash below 40 degrees separatelyDo not dry cleanDo not soak, bleach or tumble dryDry in shadeWarm iron; do not iron on decoartionsPerfect for your sporting needs, this jacket from adidas is designed to keep you warm and comfortable in the winter chill. Team it with adidas track pants or denims and sports shoes.Model statisticsThe model wears size M in jacketsHeight: 6'1', Shoulders: 18.5"
